global_config.identity_lock: Use the exact same Vietnamese female model from {model_image}, keep consistent face, body shape, hairstyle, and skin tone.
global_config.outfit_transfer: Replace the original outfit with the EXACT full outfit from {product_image}, including all clothing items shown. Preserve the full outfit combination, accurate fit, natural fabric draping, and realistic shadows.
global_config.background_lock: Use the EXACT environment from {background_image}. Keep identical background, layout, objects, lighting direction, shadows, and color tone. DO NOT add, remove, or modify any objects, props, lights, decorations, or elements. The background must remain unchanged.
global_config.composition_rules: The model must be naturally placed into the background with correct perspective, scale, and grounding shadow. Feet must touch the floor correctly.
global_config.quality: ultra realistic, 4k, natural skin texture, detailed fabric, no distortion, no extra limbs, no blur, 9:16 vertical fashion photography
global_config.base_template: Create a high-end fashion photo. {identity_lock} {outfit_transfer} {background_lock}. Camera framing: {framing}. Scene context: {context}. Focus on {focus_area}. The model stands in a naturally posed stance, with relaxed, organic body positioning. Avoid stiff or artificial posing. {composition_rules}. {quality}.

full.framing: full body fashion photo, head to toe, entire body clearly visible
full.context: natural presence, subject centered and fills the frame vertically
full.constraint: Show full body from head to toe. Feet fully visible. Do not crop legs.

medium.constraint: Show from mid-thigh to head only. Cut exactly at mid-thigh. No feet visible.

close_angle.context: natural facial expression, camera is close to subject
close_angle.constraint: Very tight framing from chest to head. No lower body visible.
